descriptions.text: Queens Road is a Strategy game, developed and published by Angel (Bandai), which was released in Japan in 1997.

In Queens Road the player has to choose and then train a princess to become the next queen. There are 5 different countries: Arsea, Drasion, Caerleon, Dynaress and Zol each one with a princess to chose. To do that the player has to make choices and improve the stats of his princess. The better the stats of the princess the most respect that she will have of his people and generals.
